summary: End-to-end testing of Bhagwati Enterprises Invoice app. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed (root, next-bill-no, invoice CRUD, list+filter, customer upsert, no _id leakage, 404s). Frontend: full UI flow tested via Playwright - Home loads, New Invoice form auto-fills bill no., totals/CGST/SGST/words compute correctly, save creates invoice and navigates to /invoice/{id}, update via PUT works, Add/Remove row works, History page lists invoices, search filter works, edit pre-fills form, delete with confirmation works, customer autocomplete dropdown shows. PDF download button does not throw runtime error. All bill design customizations verified visually (single-line BHAGWATI ENTERPRISES, 306 address, GSTIN 27ANSPK4430F1ZW, Items col, Lorry No., GST on top after email, Construction Material Supplier, regular Subject to Kalyan Jurisdiction).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/invoices returns Invoice model but the function builds Invoice(...) and returns it directly without re-fetching - works fine since _id is never populated on the model, but if Mongo ever modifies the doc, drift could occur. Currently safe.
InvoiceCreate.bill_no Optional check uses `if payload.bill_no:` which treats 0 as missing - acceptable since bill_no should never be 0 but worth noting.
No customer DELETE endpoint - test_ data accumulates in customers collection. Low priority for an internal tool.
PDF generation uses html2canvas single page - very long invoices may be cropped (Math.min with pageHeight). Consider multi-page handling later.
Frontend axios calls have no global error toast - silent console.error on customer load failure. Minor UX.
App.js is 585 lines - within limit but approaching 700 threshold. Consider splitting InvoiceForm/HistoryPage into separate files when adding features.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_AutoCust, TEST_ExplicitCust, TEST_UpdatedCust, TEST_DirectCust, TEST_UI_Customer_Z). Test invoices were deleted via the test suite/UI; TEST_ customers remain in DB (no DELETE endpoint for customers).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working. Counter starts at 1, auto-increments on POST without bill_no, $max-updates on POST with explicit bill_no. Customer upsert by name (case-sensitive). Mongo _id excluded everywhere via {_id:0} projections. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly. data-testid coverage is excellent.
